Home › Seminole County › Oviedo › CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL OF COLORADO LLC
A 100

CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL OF COLORADO LLC

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: March 20, 2026

A · 100/100 · among the cleanest kitchens in Seminole County

Is CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL OF COLORADO LLC a safe place to eat? Yes — an A grade, 100/100, at its most recent inspection on March 20, 2026. Inspectors cited no violations.

Its most recent inspection on March 20, 2026 came back clean. Diners give it 3.5 across 1,071 reviews. It's a Mexican spot in Oviedo. Menus here flag vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free, dairy-free, and other dietary options.

Get directions Call (407) 365-7274

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. March 20, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Call Back - Complied

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 0 basic

    No violations cited.

  2. March 12, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Warning Issued

    3 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 2 basic

    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests

  3. October 23, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 3 basic

    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 24 — Storage & handling of clean equipment and utensils; air drying
